case_title: STADTNER CO.INC. DBA SIERRA ELECTRIC COMPANY VS ADAMS,DOUG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $628.49 FILED BY STADTNER CO.INC. DBA SIERRA ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS,DOUG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STADTNER CO.INC. DBA SIERRA ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS,DOUG $628.49 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $643.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DOUG ADAMS RETURNED, NOT AT ADDRESS.
